cards.name: Exploding Kitten
cards.subtitle: You lose. Unless you have a Defuse.

base.prompt: A hilarious cartoon orange kitten exploding from a magical cardboard box, shocked expression, flames and confetti around it, funny chaotic energy, oversized eyes, playful comedy style

nsfw.prompt: A mischievous adult party kitten wearing a ridiculous casino outfit, holding a tiny bomb shaped like a cocktail, dramatic comedy explosion, cheeky expression, adult party joke aesthetic

cards.name: Defuse
cards.subtitle: Play when you draw an Exploding Kitten to survive.

base.prompt: A clever cartoon cat holding a giant pair of scissors about to cut a red wire, bomb defusal vest, focused expression, sweat drop, tense comedy scene

nsfw.prompt: A sassy adult party cat wearing a leather bomb defusal vest, holding wire cutters seductively, bomb behind it, winking at viewer, playful danger

cards.name: Attack
cards.subtitle: Force the next player to take 2 turns.

base.prompt: A furious kitten wearing a tiny general uniform commanding an army of cats, dramatic pointing pose, battle cries, cartoon chaos, raised paw

nsfw.prompt: A dominatrix kitten in a general uniform cracking a whip, commanding pose, army of toy cats behind it, adult party comedy

cards.name: Nope
cards.subtitle: Cancel any action except Exploding Kittens and Defuses.

base.prompt: A cartoon cat with both paws up yelling NOOO, dramatic freeze-frame pose, sweat drops, wide eyes, comedy interruption style, cartoon rejection

nsfw.prompt: A sassy adult party cat with hand out in STOP gesture, other hand on hip, unimpressed expression, red lighting, adult comedy vibes

cards.name: Skip
cards.subtitle: End your turn without drawing a card.

base.prompt: A cartoon cat fast asleep on a fluffy cloud, zzz bubbles floating, peaceful blissful expression, blue and white dreamy scene, lazy relaxation

nsfw.prompt: A cartoon cat in bed after a wild night, messy sheets, satisfied grin, empty wine glasses, morning after comedy, pillow and blanket
